text.message: Yeah was wondering why you didn’t block me
At least it happened early game :) there’s still time
Brick port should be good for you too
ive got no ore, so im gonna do very well at the start but its gonna be really hard to win
is black a lock for road?
wont even need to be long
way better ore and wheat production
Look at what red and I share.
its a tough call, you're a lock for road and i can't block him that many places without blocking myself
but i wont be able to city
yeah, again, its a tough call
it was there or his 10/3 but this felt smarter
Red you want the wheat port or nah
if i think i can get it, i'll go for it
i need to build 2 cities to win
dont know how im gonna do that
Even with army I’m on less points than them
Orange are you new to the game?
i feel like im missing something
Yes, they take army from me, red becomes the threat. baffling
He takes army here and has at least 1 vp
